title: Public Consultation: Q14 Analytical Procedure Development and Revision
description: ICH invites comments on the draft Q14 guideline covering analytical procedure development, including the lifecycle approach to method validation and continuous improvement.

title: Public Consultation: M13A Bioequivalence for Immediate-Release Solid Oral Dosage Forms
description: Stakeholders are invited to provide feedback on the draft M13A guideline establishing harmonised approaches to bioequivalence studies for immediate-release solid oral dosage forms.

title: Public Consultation: S12 Nonclinical Biodistribution Considerations for Gene Therapy Products
description: Comments are sought on the S12 guideline addressing nonclinical biodistribution study considerations for gene therapy products.

title: Public Consultation: E20 Adaptive Clinical Trials
description: ICH seeks public input on the E20 guideline providing a harmonised framework for the design, conduct, and reporting of adaptive clinical trials.

title: Public Consultation: Q13 Continuous Manufacturing of Drug Substances and Drug Products
description: This consultation on the Q13 guideline for continuous manufacturing has concluded. Comments have been reviewed and incorporated into the final document.

title: Public Consultation: S11 Nonclinical Safety Testing in Support of Development of Paediatric Medicines
description: The consultation period for S11, which addresses nonclinical safety considerations for paediatric medicines, has closed.

title: Public Consultation: M10 Bioanalytical Method Validation and Study Sample Analysis
description: The public comment period for M10 on bioanalytical method validation has concluded. The guideline is progressing to Step 4.

title: Upcoming Consultation: Q12(R1) Lifecycle Management — Revision
description: A public consultation is planned for the revision of Q12 on lifecycle management of pharmaceutical products. The consultation period will open in May 2026.
